hypothesis: Augmenting the ChemX single-agent pipeline with a fine-tuned document-layout molecule diagram localizer, DECIMER-based OCSR, and caption-linked entity resolution will increase SMILES extraction F1 to ≥0.40 on the Benzimidazoles and Oxazolidinones datasets without reducing the mean F1 of non-SMILES fields by more than 0.05.
